name_cn:
Rock Grey in stock!!️
Lady Diana 3-compartment Limited Edition Crystal Buckle, truly beautiful. New crystal letter buckle, full of luxury. Who can refuse a bling bling Diana bag? Purely hand-set crystal letter buckle, exquisite. Paired with classic quilted pattern, excellent sheepskin texture, charming, elegant, and full of presence. Crossbody or handheld, very feminine. Classic fashion style, don't miss it.
size:17*7*15cm
